content.en:
Long years have passed.

Eternal Dao Realm.

Ye Tian had already collected a large number of Eternal Magic Crystals and various resources.

this day.

Ye Tian took these resources out, and by the way, he was going to bring them back to the Void Domain.

His wife and children had already cultivated to the late stage of the Eternal Dao realm, and they were only one step away from the Eternal Dao realm.

After he went back this time, he naturally cultivated them to the Eternal Dao Realm, and then gave them a large number of high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, so that they could comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items to the Consummation Realm.

After that, they could cultivate the Perfect Dao Seed and thus carry out the Eternal Dao Body Transformation.

......

Ruins of the Argu Realm.

In this death zone, Ye Tian stepped here again, after all, the entrance to the Void Domain was here!

Wow!

Ye Tian passed through the entrance of the Void Domain and stepped into the Valley of Mythology.

The mythical spirit, when it saw Ye Tian, it didn't attack again, it had been scared for 24 days.

Wow!

Ye Tian came out directly from the Mythical Valley, and there was no need to wait for a specific time.

After all, with his current strength, the danger of Mythical Valley was nothing at all.

He can enter and exit the Valley of Myths at any time, unaffected.

Subsequently.

He went straight to the human realm.

Soon, he was back in the human realm.

......

The Human Domain, the Terran Temple, the Miro Domain.

Ye Tian gathered his wife and children here.

"These resources are for you!"

Ye Tian took out a bunch of resources, among which there were high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, in the Void Domain, this kind of treasure was extremely rare and hard to find, but in the Nine Extremes Alliance, it was not very rare.

He is too lazy to synthesize now, and directly buys it, after all, he has earned too much from the Eternal Dao Realm, and he is not short of Nine Pole Points.

Therefore, in a short period of time, he had acquired a bunch of high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, which was enough for them to comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to the consummation realm.

In order to enable them to comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao rules to the consummation realm faster, Ye Tian also traded an Eternal Primordial Treasure with the help of the Nine Extremes Alliance, and this Eternal Primordial Treasure was to assist in comprehending the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, which could be described as very useful.

For a faction, such an Eternal Primordial Treasure is very important, so the price is much heavier than the ordinary Eternal Primordial Treasure.

Ye Tian spent a full 200,000 Nine Pole Points to take it down.

If it is other eternal realms, I can't give up at all.

After that, he sent this Eternal Primordial Treasure to the Void Domain, and was the first to let his wife Xiao Yue come to comprehend the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao.

......

Time flies.

With the help of this Eternal Primordial Treasure and the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, Xiao Yue's own Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules made rapid progress, and after just 30 million Dao Era years, she successfully comprehended the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the consummation realm.

Then.

Ye Tian passed on the Perfect Dao Seed to Xiao Yue.

"Yue'er, this is the cultivation method of the perfect level Dao Seed, the Perfect Dao Seed is very important, it must not be leaked out, and no one can say it. "

Ye Tian talked about the preciousness of the perfect-level Dao Species and the fate of countless Eternal Dao Realms within the Eternal Realm.

Rumble!!!!!

Xiao Yue quickly inherited the Perfect-level Dao Seed, and then began to cultivate the Perfect-level Dao Seed.

Under Ye Tian's guidance, she easily and thoroughly cultivated to a perfect-level Dao Rank.

When Ye Tian saw that Xiao Yue's body had begun to slightly undergo the Eternal Dao Body, he knew that Xiao Yue had already cultivated to a perfect-level Eternal Dao Species.

Then, Ye Tian took out a lot of the Eternal Demon Crystal, "Yue'er, this is the Eternal Demon Crystal, it is poison for other Eternal Dao Realms, but for our powerhouses with the perfect Eternal Dao Seed, it is the Supreme Kui Treasure of the Eternal Dao Body!"

Xiao Yue took these Eternal Demon Crystals and began to cultivate hard to improve the Eternal Dao Body.

And she usually occasionally creates Dao Seed Secret Techniques, but she didn't copy her body and didn't dare to urge the Ruin Sun Disk, so she couldn't quickly create Dao Seed Secret Techniques, but relying on the long years to create slowly, she was still able to create Dao Seed Secret Techniques that suited her.

With the help of the Eternal Demon Crystal, Xiao Yue's Eternal Dao Body Transformation progressed too quickly.

And not long after, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue also mastered the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao rules of the Consummation Realm, and they were also given the Perfection Eternal Dao Inheritance by Ye Tian, and reminded them that they could not pass it on, and also explained the situation.

They also agreed, and they would never say it, even if there were descendants among them who had reached the level of the Eternal Dao Realm in the future, and their character was good, they could give them a perfect-level Eternal Dao Inheritance.

Of course, the less you know, the safer.

But Ye Tian now also knew that the inheritance of the Eternal Dao Seed could not be passed on forever, and there was a limit to the number of times.

Now, the perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed has been inherited four times, and he obviously feels that the Ruins Dao Seed can only be inherited a few more times, and it cannot be inherited, which is not allowed by heaven and earth.

For this situation, he had already anticipated it.

If it can really be passed on forever, then if there are really well-intentioned powerhouses, and they have transcended the Eternal Dao Realm and deliberately spread in large quantities, wouldn't they all be able to obtain the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Species?

But in reality, this situation does not exist, and after being passed down many times, it will disappear forever and can no longer be transmitted.

Only the Inferior Eternal Dao Species, the Elementary Eternal Dao Species, the Intermediate Eternal Dao Species, and the Advanced Eternal Dao Species do not have a limit of 477 times.

No, maybe there is a limit to the number of times a high-level Eternal Dao Species, but the number of times is far more than that of a Perfect-level Eternal Dao Species!

"It seems that the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Species can't be spread casually, you have to keep it well!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon after.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue all cultivated to perfection-level Eternal Dao Seeds, and Ye Tian also gave them a large number of Eternal Demon Crystals to help them complete the Eternal Dao Body.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian didn't care about them and let them cultivate by themselves.

His current goal is to raise his Eternal Dao Body to the Xiaocheng realm, and once he reaches the Xiaocheng realm, his strength is definitely not weaker than the original Aughu Realm Lord.

After all, the Eternal Dao Species of the Ancient Realm is only an Eternal Dao Body that has reached the Dacheng Realm, but the Eternal Dao Species of the Ancient Realm Lord is only a medium Eternal Dao Species, and the problem is very big, while his is a Perfect-level Eternal Dao Species, and it has superimposed eighteen Mythical Strongest Bodies, and its foundation is extremely strong and powerful.

Taken together, it can naturally be comparable to the combat power of the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom.

However.

There are still very few resources in the Eternal Dao Realm that can help improve the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Body, and relying on the resources of the Eternal Dao Realm, it will undoubtedly take a long time to raise the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Body to the Xiaocheng Realm.

"Gotta find a way to get better resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.
